1 + (389/32 - (2056005*Log[2])/233522 + (8190315*Log[3])/934088)*et^2 + (3577/64 + (50149295*Log[2])/467044 - (155615985*Log[3])/3736352)*et^4 + (43049/256 - (12561332945*Log[2])/16813584 + (4709431125*Log[3])/59781632 + (182861328125*Log[5])/538034688)*et^6 + (102005/256 + (43574367025*Log[2])/16813584 + (642112505685*Log[3])/478253056 - (7863037109375*Log[5])/4304277504)*et^8 + (207311/256 - (95758853813*Log[2])/9340880 - (626952624117057*Log[3])/76520488960 + (584607666015625*Log[5])/137736880128 + (3555923570947307*Log[7])/688684400640)*et^10
